en: Hey mom, do you know what epiphany means?
Epiphany is, a moment in which you suddenly see or understand something, in a new or very clear way.
Oh, I see. Can you give me an example?
Seeing her father again when she was an adult, was an epiphany,
that changed her whole view of her childhood.
So here, seeing her father again was a big thing. It changed her a lot, right?
Exactly. It was an epiphany for her. Epiphany is a moment,
when you suddenly feel that you understand something, that is very important to you.
Oh, I am having an epiphany right now. I had always misunderstood this word.
